title: Tick Control New Brighton (Staten Island) | $125-$325 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional tick control in New Brighton, Staten Island. Expert tick treatment & prevention for yards and properties. Licensed technicians. Call today for $125-$325 service!
intro: New Brighton residents face increasing tick populations due to the neighborhood's proximity to parks and green spaces along the North Shore. Our professional tick control services protect your family and pets from Lyme disease and other tick-borne illnesses with targeted treatments designed for Staten Island properties. Best Pest Control NYC delivers effective, eco-friendly tick elimination throughout New Brighton's residential areas.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over a decade of tick control expertise to New Brighton, utilizing EPA-approved treatments that are safe for children and pets. Our licensed technicians understand Staten Island's unique tick habitats and provide customized solutions with guaranteed results and same-day service availability.
localContext: New Brighton's tree-lined streets, proximity to Snug Harbor Cultural Center & Botanical Garden, and mix of historic Victorian homes and modern residences create ideal conditions for tick populations to thrive. The neighborhood's abundant yards, gardens, and close access to waterfront parks require professional tick management to keep outdoor spaces safe for families throughout the spring and summer months.

faqs.question: What does tick control service include in New Brighton?
faqs.answer: Our tick control service includes a comprehensive yard inspection, targeted application of EPA-approved tick treatments to high-risk areas (tall grass, shrubs, property perimeters), tick habitat reduction recommendations, and follow-up treatments as needed. We focus on areas where ticks commonly hide and where your family and pets spend time outdoors.

faqs.question: When is tick season in New Brighton, Staten Island?
faqs.answer: Tick season in New Brighton typically runs from April through October, with peak activity in May, June, and July. However, deer ticks can be active even during mild winter days. We recommend beginning preventive treatments in early spring and maintaining protection through fall for optimal results.

faqs.question: How much does tick control cost in New Brighton?
faqs.answer: Tick control services in New Brighton range from $125 to $325 depending on your property size, the severity of infestation, and treatment frequency. We offer one-time treatments as well as seasonal packages with multiple applications for ongoing protection. A free inspection allows us to provide an accurate quote for your specific needs.

faqs.question: Is tick treatment safe for my children and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-registered tick control products that are safe for children and pets when applied by our licensed professionals. We follow strict application protocols and provide clear instructions on re-entry times, typically allowing your family and pets to return to treated areas within 2-4 hours after application dries.
